channel.title: Guide on Harshdeep Singh
channel.description: Recent content in Guide on Harshdeep Singh

item.title: Learn Docker the Right Way
item.description:
Docker may feel confusing because there are many layers (images, containers, networks, volumes, registries). These two videos should be viewed as connected parts of a clear Docker learning path.

Recommended videos

Part 1: Learn Docker

Part 2: Learn Docker Compose

Why both parts matter

Together these videos form a complete beginner-friendly sequence: Part 1 builds the foundation, and Part 2 reinforces it with real Docker examples and workflows.

item.title: My Cryptography Learning Journey
item.description:
This post documents my personal journey of learning cryptography. I’ve curated and organized the exact resources, videos, and concepts I used—starting from foundational math to public key cryptography. If you’re someone starting out or struggling with the core ideas, this learning path might give you the clarity and structure you need.

1. Cryptography Fundamentals

First, I built my foundation with these resources:

  • ChatGPT Thread for Introduction to Cryptography → Read this to kickstart.

2. Cryptography Basics

These videos helped me understand core concepts:
